title: Wan2.2 Image to Video
description: Generate high-quality videos from a single image using Wan-AI/Wan2.2-I2V-A14B (27B MoE, 14B active). Supports 480P and 720P output with optional text-prompt guidance.

config.gpuIds: NVIDIA A100 80GB PCIe,NVIDIA A100-SXM4-80GB,NVIDIA H100 80GB HBM3,NVIDIA H100 NVL,NVIDIA H100 PCIe

input.name: Default Resolution
input.description: Default output resolution. Individual requests can override this via the 'resolution' input field.

input.name: Enable CPU Offload
input.description: Offload model layers to CPU RAM to lower peak GPU VRAM usage. Slower throughput but enables GPUs with less than 80GB VRAM.

input.name: HuggingFace Token
input.description: HuggingFace access token. Required only if using private or gated models.
